nature_language: 我目前在北京，计划和两个朋友一起去重庆玩两天。并且希望住在重庆INDITION英迪逊酒店(江北嘴金融城店)。请帮我们制定一个旅行计划。
hard_logic_py:
result_list=[]
accommodation_name_set=set()
for activity in allactivities(plan):
  if activity_type(activity)=='accommodation': accommodation_name_set.add(activity_position(activity))
result=({"重庆INDITION英迪逊酒店(江北嘴金融城店)"}<=accommodation_name_set)
result_list.append(result)
result=False
if day_count(plan)==2:
  result=True
result_list.append(result)
result=False
if people_count(plan)==3:
  result=True
result_list.append(result)
result=True
for r in result_list:
  result=result and r
